Hero.name: Gustavo Nicolau
Hero.description: I merge technology and creativity to build immersive and functional digital experiences. Working with React, Node.js, and modern performance-driven architecture.

About.heading: About Me
About.paragraph: I'm a passionate software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Expert in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Proficient in Node.js, Python, and database design

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.description: Experience with AWS, Azure, and scalable systems

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Strong eye for design and user experience

Skills.paragraph: A comprehensive toolkit for building modern, scalable applications

Contact.heading: Get In Touch
Contact.paragraph: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Feel free to reach out!
Contact.footer: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
